CustomField.description: 1. Yes, we are using this field in backend code 1.1. MR Rate Start Date is blank on supplement rent and Lease Start Date is not blank on lease record then we are populating MR Rate Start Date with Lease Start Date value. 1.2. We are using this field value in calcuation when creating Rates Schedule(MR Rate) records.
CustomField.label: MR Rate Start Date
